title: Wget2 Plugin
description: Schema representing the Wget2 plugin API structure, including plugin registration, URL filter callbacks, and post-download processor callbacks via libwget.

pluginName.description: The registered name of the Wget2 plugin as returned by wget_plugin_get_name().

initializerFunction.description: Name of the required entry point: wget_plugin_initializer(). Called when the plugin is loaded.

receivesExitStatus.description: The finalizer receives the exit status of wget.

optionHandler.description: Callback for handling plugin-specific command-line options.

urlFilter.description: Callback for intercepting and filtering URLs before download.

actions.description: Possible intercept actions the filter can take.

postProcessor.description: Callback for processing files after they have been downloaded.

fileAccess.description: Available file access methods in the post-processor callback.

downloadedFile.description: Structure representing a file that has been downloaded by Wget2.

sourceUrl.description: The origin URL of the downloaded file.

localFilename.description: The local file system path where the file was saved.

size.description: Size of the downloaded file in bytes.

recurse.description: Whether URL scanning (recursive link extraction) should be performed on this file.

recurseUrls.description: URLs discovered during post-processing and queued for recursive download.
